components.name: Day Cell
components.description: A single day cell used inside Calendar and DatePicker. Displays a day number with state-dependent styling for selection, ranges, and disabled states.

installation.import:
// Internal sub-component — used by Calendar and DatePicker
// Not exported separately

examples.name: Single States
examples.description: Individual day cell states for single date selection.

examples.name: Range States
examples.description: Day cell states for date range selection.

props.name: state
props.description: Visual state of the day cell

bestPractices.do: Use DayCell as instance swap inside Calendar and DatePicker.
bestPractices.dont: Render DayCell standalone outside calendar context.

bestPractices.do: Keep all 10 states to cover single + range selection.
bestPractices.dont: Remove range states even if only single mode is used — buyers may need both.

keyboard.action: Navigate between days in the calendar grid

notes: Day cells receive aria-selected when selected
Outside days have aria-disabled for screen readers

related.name: Calendar
related.desc: Month calendar grid using Day Cell instances.

components.name: Preset Item
components.description: A preset shortcut item used in the DatePicker Range sidebar. Displays a quick date range option with default, hover, and active states.

installation.import:
// Internal sub-component — used by DatePicker Range sidebar
// Not exported separately

props.name: state
props.description: Visual state of the preset item

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click handler for selecting the preset

bestPractices.do: Use PresetItem as instance inside DatePicker Range presets sidebar.
bestPractices.dont: Render PresetItem standalone outside DatePicker context.

figmaMapping.value: primary bg, primary-foreground text, medium weight

notes: Acts as a button for preset date range selection

related.name: Date Picker
related.desc: Parent component — PresetItem lives in the Range mode sidebar.

components.name: Calendar
components.description: A single-month date picker calendar built on react-day-picker. Displays navigation, weekday headers, and a grid of Day Cell instances. Used standalone or composed inside DatePicker.

examples.name: Outside Days
examples.description: Toggle visibility of days from adjacent months.

props.name: numberOfMonths
props.description: Number of months to display (range mode uses 2)

bestPractices.do: Use Calendar inline when date selection is the primary task on the page.
bestPractices.dont: Use Calendar inline for quick date picking — use DatePicker with popover instead.

bestPractices.do: Disable dates outside valid ranges with the disabled prop.
bestPractices.dont: Allow selection of invalid dates and validate later.

bestPractices.do: Show outside days by default — it helps users understand the month context.
bestPractices.dont: Hide outside days when the calendar is used in a date range context.

keyboard.action: Navigate to first/last day of week

notes: Day cells receive aria-selected when selected
Outside days have aria-disabled for screen readers

related.name: Day Cell
related.desc: Sub-component for individual day states — 10 state variants.

related.name: Preset Item
related.desc: Sub-component for preset shortcuts in DatePicker Range sidebar.

related.name: Date Picker
related.desc: Calendar in a popover with trigger button.

related.name: Input
related.desc: For manual date entry as text.

components.name: Date Picker Trigger
components.description: The trigger button for Date Picker. Displays a calendar icon and selected date text in an input-style field. Supports default, hover, error, and disabled states.

examples.name: States
examples.description: All trigger states with placeholder value.

props.name: value
props.description: Whether to show placeholder or filled date

props.name: date
props.description: Selected date to display when filled

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text when no date selected

bestPractices.do: Use DatePickerTrigger for design system documentation and static Figma representations.
bestPractices.dont: Use DatePickerTrigger in app pages — use the composed DatePicker or DateRangePicker instead.

bestPractices.do: Show error state with a helper text below the trigger for context.
bestPractices.dont: Use error state alone without explaining what went wrong.

figmaMapping.codeValue: h-9 w-full sm:w-[280px] rounded-lg border bg-input px-sm

notes: Trigger acts as a button with aria-haspopup
Displays selected date text for screen readers
Disabled state sets disabled attribute on button

related.name: Date Picker
related.desc: Calendar popover — the content shown when trigger is clicked.

components.name: Date Picker
components.description: Calendar popover panel for date selection. Single mode shows a one-month calendar. Range mode shows a two-month calendar with preset shortcuts sidebar and an action footer with Cancel/Apply buttons.

examples.name: Modes
examples.description: Single month and range (two-month with presets) calendar panels.

bestPractices.do: Use DatePicker for single dates and DateRangePicker for date ranges.
bestPractices.dont: Build a custom date input — use the pre-built picker for consistency.

bestPractices.do: Set sensible default dates close to the expected selection.
bestPractices.dont: Open the calendar defaulting to January 1970 — default to today or the relevant context date.

bestPractices.do: Use presets in DateRangePicker for common ranges (Last 7/30 days, This month).
bestPractices.dont: Skip presets when users frequently select the same date ranges.

figmaMapping.value: Inline two-month grid with shared nav

figmaMapping.codeValue: flex flex-col gap-3xs border-r p-sm min-w-[140px]
flex items-center justify-between border-t px-md py-sm

notes: Uses Calendar component internally — inherits all Calendar accessibility
DateRangePicker shows 2-month view with preset sidebar
Focus moves into the popover on open
Focus returns to trigger on close

related.name: Date Picker Trigger
related.desc: The trigger button that opens this popover.

related.name: Calendar
related.desc: Standalone calendar without popover — use for inline date selection.

related.name: Day Cell
related.desc: Sub-component for individual day states inside Calendar.

related.name: Preset Item
related.desc: Sub-component for preset shortcuts in Range sidebar.

related.name: Popover
related.desc: Floating panel used to host the calendar dropdown.
